chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1370 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Before; Mr. Justice Muhammad Shafi Siddiqui Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah. 1. For orders on M.A. No.4874/2022. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A. No.4875/2022. 4. For orders on M.A. No.4876/2022. 5. For hearing of main case. 07.04.2022 Mr. Ghulam Shabir Daudani, Advocate for the petitioners. == Urgency is granted. The petitioners, by way of instant petition have mainly sought for restraint against the respondents from relocating the subject water course. The relocation of subject water course, if any, is involving factual controversy same could not be resolved by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction under the garb of harassment; consequently instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E Muhammad Danish*
